message:
test(fj-conformance): add 29 oracle tests for control flow primitives

Completes primitive coverage with tests for:
- Cond: 7 tests for conditional selection (scalar/tensor, true/false paths)
- Switch: 6 tests for multi-branch selection by index
- Scan: 8 tests for iterative accumulation (sum, product, min, max, reverse)
- While: 8 tests for loop execution (various conditions: lt, le, gt, ge, ne)

All 110 primitives now have oracle test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
